---
title: ""
subtitle: ""
page-layout: article
toc: false
comments: false
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

```{=html}
<div class="nb-home">
  <section class="nb-hero">
    <div class="nb-hero-copy">
      <div class="nb-kicker">Researcher and Technical Lead</div>
      <h1>Yulia Tyukhova</h1>
      <p class="nb-hero-subtitle">
        Human-centered research in lighting quality, glare, and visual comfort.
      </p>
      <div class="nb-hero-actions">
        <a class="nb-button ghost" href="posts/">Read Hai-lights</a>
        <a class="nb-button ghost" href="contact.qmd">Get in touch</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="nb-hero-media">
      <img class="nb-hero-photo" src="images/Yulia_Tyukhova2.jpg" alt="Portrait of Yulia Tyukhova" />
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="nb-features">
    <div class="nb-feature">
      <h2>Excellence</h2>
      <p>Evaluation of discomfort glare, luminance measurement, and visual comfort metrics.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="nb-feature">
      <h2>Impact</h2>
      <p>Data-driven analysis, study design, and interpretable outcomes for decision makers.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="nb-feature">
      <h2>Passion</h2>
      <p>Technical committee expertise to translate research into practice and policy.</p>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="nb-quote">
    <div class="nb-quote-card">
      <p> 
        "Lighting research should move seamlessly from measurement to practice.
        Yulia Tyukhova helps teams bridge that gap with clarity and rigor."
      </p>
      <div class="nb-quote-attrib">— Yulia Tyukhova, Ph.D.</div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="nb-cta">
    <h2>Start a project in days, not months.</h2>
    <p>Let’s define the right metrics and methods for your lighting challenge.</p>
    <a class="nb-button" href="contact.qmd">Contact Yulia Tyukhova</a>
  </section>
</div>
```
